what: Implement blocking onboarding state that is enforced whenever no valid non-archived project exists, with exactly two manual inputs: name and path.

where.description: Create onboarding page component with name/path fields and create action.
Gate app rendering by active-project availability and route to onboarding state when required.
Add tests for blocking behavior and successful creation flow transition.

acceptance.given: No existing project and a valid form submission
acceptance.then: Project is created, set active, and app navigates to regular content.

acceptance.given: No existing project and invalid path submission
acceptance.then: Onboarding remains visible and a concrete validation error is displayed.

patterns.name: UI as Adapter
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 2 web components consume hooks only

patterns.name: Feature Slice Isolation
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 1 projects UI under features/projects

context: The app must never allow operation without a valid active project context.
technicalNotes: Do not add extra onboarding fields. Keep manual path input only. Merge-safe: create new projects feature page/tests and minimal root gating logic. Models: Codex gpt-5.2-codex (medium), Claude Sonnet 4.6 (medium).
